description: Detects git commits and triggers software bible updates via sonnet agent

hooks.prompt: Does this Bash command contain the literal string 'git commit'? (Not git status, git add, git log, git diff, or any other command — ONLY 'git commit'.) If YES and the tool succeeded: return a systemMessage telling Claude to spawn the new-testament:bible-updater agent in the background to update the software bible. If NO: respond ONLY with the word 'approve' — no explanation, no systemMessage, no other text.
